refined_caption: The hospital bathroom appears to be unhygienic with visible dirt. A ladder is also present in the bathroom.
complaint_description: I was shocked to see the state of the hospital bathroom, it was dirty and unhygienic. The presence of a ladder in the bathroom is also a concern. This is unacceptable for a healthcare facility.
voice_text: The bathroom in this hospital is disgusting, it's really dirty and there's even a ladder just sitting there.
